class.name: RiderLocator
class.brief_description: Discovers installed JetBrains Rider IDEs on the local machine.
class.description: Asynchronously scans the system for installed JetBrains Rider IDEs and reports the results via the [signal installations_loaded] signal. The scan runs off the main thread so the editor stays responsive.

method.name: start_search
method.description: Begins the asynchronous search. Calling this more than once on the same instance is a no-op.

signal.name: installations_loaded
signal.description: Emitted on the main thread once the search finishes.
